limitations: retrieval_score and recency_score default to 0.0 — populated by evaluator logic, not automatically computed.
contradiction_ids defaults to '[]' (JSON array string); deduplication relies on DurableMemoryProvider logic.
governance_reason_code is nullable; absence means no governed-memory reason code was assigned.
is_stale and is_disputed are stored as INTEGER (0/1) in SQLite and cast on read.
durable_to_memory_lossy and memory_to_durable_lossy duplicate deprecated function logic — callers opt in explicitly.
cited_evidence_ids and rejected_action_summary default to empty/None in build_with_context; population requires callers to extend AnswerEnvelopeBuilder.
